queries.query: SELECT course_id, title, member_id FROM courses
SELECT course_id, title, member_id FROM courses WHERE member_id = ?
SELECT course_id, title, member_id FROM courses WHERE course_id = ?
SELECT course_id, title, member_id FROM courses WHERE title LIKE ?
UPDATE courses SET title = ? WHERE course_id = ?
SELECT lecture_id, course_id, title FROM lectures WHERE course_id = ?
SELECT lecture_id, course_id, title FROM lectures WHERE lecture_id = ?
SELECT c.course_id, c.title AS course_title, c.member_id, l.lecture_id, l.title AS lecture_title FROM courses c LEFT JOIN lectures l ON c.course_id = l.course_id WHERE c.course_id = ?

SELECT c.course_id, c.title AS course_title, c.member_id, l.lecture_id, l.title AS lecture_title FROM courses c LEFT JOIN lectures l ON c.course_id = l.course_id WHERE c.member_id = ? ORDER BY c.course_id

SELECT c.course_id, c.title, c.member_id, ROUND(AVG(r.rating), 1) AS avg_rating, COUNT(r.review_id) AS review_count FROM courses c LEFT JOIN course_reviews r ON c.course_id = r.course_id WHERE c.title LIKE ? GROUP BY c.course_id, c.title, c.member_id ORDER BY avg_rating DESC
SELECT m.member_id, m.name, m.email, sc.status FROM studying_courses sc JOIN members m ON sc.member_id = m.member_id WHERE sc.course_id = ?
SELECT r.review_id, r.course_id, r.member_id, m.name, r.contents, r.rating FROM course_reviews r JOIN members m ON r.member_id = m.member_id WHERE r.course_id = ?
